# Zro2One

> AI education for everyone. Every AI concept — from first principles to frontier research — explained at the depth that's right for you. No gatekeeping, no jargon walls.

Zro2One (zro2.one) is a free AI education site that explains every major AI concept at four depth levels: Essential (plain English, no prerequisites), Applied (practical use for professionals), Technical (architecture and code for builders), and Research (frontier concepts for experts). The site covers foundational AI, machine learning, large language models, deep learning, NLP, and more.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://zro2.one/): Overview of the platform and learning paths
- [Learn](https://zro2.one/learn/): Full article catalog with depth filtering by topic
- [Search](https://zro2.one/search/): Full-text search across all content (powered by Pagefind)
- [About](https://zro2.one/about/): Mission, approach, and depth level explanation
- [This Week in AI](https://zro2.one/learn/topic/this-week-in-ai/): Weekly AI news digest
- [Newsletter](https://zro2.one/newsletter/): Weekly AI insights by email

## Beginner Path (Start Here)

- [What is AI? (And What It Isn't)](https://zro2.one/learn/what-is-ai/): Clear, honest explanation of what artificial intelligence actually is and isn't — no hype, no jargon. 6 min read.
- [The AI Glossary: Every Term You Actually Need to Know](https://zro2.one/learn/ai-glossary/): Plain-English definitions of every AI term you'll encounter, organized by how likely you are to encounter them. 8 min read.
- [How to Start Using AI Today — A Practical Guide](https://zro2.one/learn/start-using-ai-today/): Concrete steps to actually try AI tools, pick the right one, and build AI into your daily workflow starting now. 7 min read.

## AI Foundations

- [AI Map — How ML, Deep Learning, NLP, LLMs, and MLLMs Fit Together](https://zro2.one/learn/ai-map-how-ml-dl-llm-fit/): A visual and conceptual map showing how every branch of AI relates to each other.
- [Machine Learning — The Plain-English Guide](https://zro2.one/learn/machine-learning-essential/): What machine learning is, what it is not, and why it works — explained with zero jargon.
- [Machine Learning in the Real World — A Practical Playbook](https://zro2.one/learn/machine-learning-applied/): How teams actually use ML in products: use cases, rollout strategy, metrics, and common failure modes.
- [Machine Learning for Builders — Architecture, Trade-offs, and Deployment](https://zro2.one/learn/machine-learning-technical/): A technical deep dive into the ML system lifecycle: data design, training, evaluation, serving, and reliability.
- [Machine Learning Frontier — Open Problems That Actually Matter](https://zro2.one/learn/machine-learning-research/): A research-level map of unresolved ML problems: generalization, robustness, data efficiency, causality, and alignment.
- [What is Deep Learning? (Without the Hype)](https://zro2.one/learn/what-is-deep-learning-essential/): Deep learning explained clearly: what it is, why it works, and where it fits.
- [What is NLP? (Natural Language Processing)](https://zro2.one/learn/what-is-nlp-essential/): How computers work with human language — explained simply.
- [What is an LLM?](https://zro2.one/learn/what-is-llm-essential/): A simple explanation of large language models and what they are actually doing.
- [What is an MLLM? (Multimodal LLM)](https://zro2.one/learn/what-is-mllm-essential/): Models that understand and generate across text, images, audio, and more — explained clearly.

## How LLMs Work (4 Depths — Same Topic)

- [How LLMs Work — The Plain English Version](https://zro2.one/learn/how-llms-work-essential/): Large language models explained with no jargon, no math, just clear analogies. 5 min read.
- [How LLMs Work — What It Means for How You Use Them](https://zro2.one/learn/how-llms-work-applied/): How LLMs work under the hood and what it means for getting better results from them. 10 min read.
- [How LLMs Work — The Transformer Architecture Explained](https://zro2.one/learn/how-llms-work-technical/): Transformer architecture, attention mechanisms, training pipelines, and engineering decisions. 15 min read.
- [How LLMs Work — Open Problems and Frontier Research](https://zro2.one/learn/how-llms-work-research/): Scaling laws, emergent capabilities, mechanistic interpretability, reasoning limitations, and where the field is heading. 20 min read.

## Practical AI Guides

- [Prompting That Actually Works (Without Overthinking It)](https://zro2.one/learn/prompting-that-actually-works/): A practical prompting workflow for better answers, fewer retries, and less AI frustration. 9 min read.
- [How to Build Your First AI Workflow in 60 Minutes](https://zro2.one/learn/how-to-build-ai-workflow-in-60-min/): Step-by-step playbook to turn one repetitive task into a reliable AI-assisted workflow. 10 min read.
- [RAG for Builders: The Mental Model You Actually Need](https://zro2.one/learn/rag-for-builders-mental-model/): Retrieval-Augmented Generation explained: when to use it, where it fails, and what to measure.
- [API Integration Patterns for LLM Features](https://zro2.one/learn/api-integration-patterns-for-llms/): How to ship LLM features safely: request shaping, guardrails, retries, and observability. 13 min read.

## AI Tool Comparisons

- [ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini (2026): Which One for What?](https://zro2.one/learn/chatgpt-vs-claude-vs-gemini-2026/): Practical guide to which AI model to use for writing, analysis, coding, and team workflows. 10 min read.
- [Notion AI vs Coda AI vs Slite AI: Team Knowledge Tool Comparison](https://zro2.one/learn/notion-ai-vs-coda-ai-vs-slite-ai/): Which AI-enabled knowledge tool is best for your team docs, collaboration style, and operating cadence. 9 min read.
- [Perplexity vs Google vs ChatGPT Search: Fast Guide](https://zro2.one/learn/perplexity-vs-google-vs-chatgpt-search/): When to use each search mode for research, fact-checking, and decision-making. 8 min read.

## This Week in AI (Weekly Digest)

- [This Week in AI #003: The Military AI Reckoning](https://zro2.one/learn/this-week-in-ai-003/): AI went to war — literally. The Anthropic-Pentagon crisis, OpenAI's military deal, and what it means for the industry. 9 min read.
- [This Week in AI #002: The Productivity Reality Check](https://zro2.one/learn/this-week-in-ai-002/): Where AI is creating real leverage and where teams are still wasting cycles. 8 min read.
- [This Week in AI #001: What Actually Matters](https://zro2.one/learn/this-week-in-ai-001/): What changed in AI this week, what to ignore, and what to test. 8 min read.

## Feeds & Discovery

- [RSS Feed](https://zro2.one/rss.xml): Full article feed in RSS/XML format
- [Sitemap](https://zro2.one/sitemap-index.xml): XML sitemap of all pages
